common.tagline: Understand your vet bill before you pay it.
common.feedback_subtitle: Your honest take helps us protect more pet owners.
common.payment_success: Payment received — your plan is active.
common.reminders_empty: No reminders yet. Add a refill, vaccine, or lab date and we'll email you.
common.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.name: Name

landing.hero_body: Got a large vet estimate? Upload it. We'll explain every charge in plain English, flag what may need clarification, and give you the exact questions to ask your vet before you say yes.
landing.step1_desc: Photo, PDF, or paste the line items. We accept any format.
landing.step2_desc: Every charge is translated to plain English. Nothing is skipped.
landing.step3_desc: Walk into your vet appointment prepared with the right questions.

auth.start_protecting: Start protecting your pet's health budget.
auth.forgot_desc: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.login_desc: Sign in to continue to PetBill Shield.
auth.reset_sent_to: We sent a reset link to
auth.link_expires: The link expires in 24 hours. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
auth.will_only_send: We'll only send a link if this email matches an account.
auth.google_redirect: You'll be redirected to Google to sign in securely
auth.google_note: Clicking Google will take you to accounts.google.com
auth.safe_desc: PetBill Shield never diagnoses pets and never replaces your vet. It helps you understand costs and ask better questions.
auth.ai_bill_analysis: AI bill analysis — no diagnosis, ever
auth.pet_vault_feature: Pet vault with records, meds & reminders
auth.reset_success: Password reset successful. Please sign in.

dashboard.feature_requires_paid: This feature requires a paid plan.
dashboard.moves_to_free: Moves to free tier after end date. Your data is never deleted.

home.setup_desc: Let's set things up — it only takes a minute.
home.add_first_pet_desc: Create a profile in your pet vault so bills link to the right animal.
home.analyze_first_bill_desc: Upload a vet invoice for a plain-English breakdown of every charge.
home.set_reminder_desc: Never miss a vaccination, medication refill, or annual checkup.
home.all_clear_desc: No urgent reminders or flagged bills right now.
home.add_first_pet_prompt: Start with one pet profile. Everything else becomes easier from there.
home.no_bills_yet: Upload your first bill or add a pet to begin.
home.bills_building_history: Your latest bill analyses are keeping your pets protected.
home.spent_this_year: ${{amount}} in pet care recorded this year.
home.from_claims: from {{count}} claim in the last {{months}} months
home.from_claims_plural: from {{count}} claims in the last {{months}} months

analyze.title: Hand us the bill. We'll read it for you.
analyze.subtitle: Upload a PDF or photo, or paste the line items. We'll translate every charge into plain English, flag what may need clarification, and give you exact questions to ask.
analyze.select_pet_placeholder: Choose a pet from your vault
analyze.no_pets_paid: No pets in your vault yet.
analyze.drop_file: Drop a PDF or image here
analyze.reading_charges_sub: Parsing your document line by line
analyze.spotting_concerns_sub: Checking for items worth clarifying with your vet
analyze.transparency_title: Optional · Help build the vet price transparency database
analyze.transparency_desc: Share your city and state (anonymously) so we can show other pet owners how your quote compares to local averages. Your name and pet details are never stored.
analyze.tip1: Most vet bills have at least one charge worth a quick question.
analyze.tip2: Our AI analyzes charges line by line — not just the total.
analyze.tip3: PetBill Shield flags items for conversation, not confrontation.
analyze.tip4: You can share your full analysis via a link — useful for insurers.
analyze.tip5: Understanding your bill is the first step to asking better questions.
analyze.benefit_plain_desc: Every line item translated out of vet-speak.
analyze.benefit_flags_desc: Polite flags for items worth clarifying.

analysis.ai_estimate_label: AI estimate · no local reports yet
analysis.no_line_items: No individual line items were identified.

pets.title: Pet vault
pets.subtitle: Store health records, medications, reminders, and vet history for each pet.
pets.no_pets_desc: Add your first pet to start tracking their health and costs.
pets.delete_confirm: Delete this pet and all their records? This cannot be undone.
pets.limit_reached: Pet limit reached for your plan.

pricing.title: Peace of mind for pet care costs.
pricing.subtitle: PetBill Shield helps you understand vet bills, track care costs, prepare better conversations, and stay ahead of every reminder.
pricing.switch_annual_desc: You're on {{plan}} monthly — lock in annual billing and get 2 months free.
pricing.billing_rules_title: What happens when you change plans
pricing.billing_rules_desc: We use Stripe for all billing. Here's exactly what to expect mid-subscription.
pricing.upgrade_mid_desc: You're charged a prorated amount for the remaining days in your current billing period. New plan features are unlocked immediately.
pricing.downgrade_mid_desc: Your current plan stays active until the end of the billing period. The new (lower) plan takes effect at renewal. No refund for unused time.
pricing.cancel_anytime_desc: You keep full access to your current plan until the billing period ends. No charge after cancellation. Your data stays safe.
pricing.switch_annual_rule_desc: Switching from monthly to annual starts a new 12-month period. Switching back takes effect when the current annual period expires.
pricing.powered_by_stripe: Powered by Stripe · Subscriptions renew automatically and can be cancelled anytime from your account.
pricing.immediate_access: You'll get immediate access to all {{plan}} features. A prorated charge for the remaining days will appear on your next invoice.
pricing.keeps_access: You'll keep {{current}} access until your billing period ends{{date}}. After that, you'll move to {{plan}}. No refund for unused time.
pricing.proration_note: Proration is handled automatically by Stripe. You won't be double-charged.
pricing.renewal_note: Your subscription will renew at the new rate when your current period ends.
pricing.cancel_keeps_access: Your {{plan}} access continues until {{date}}. After that, your account moves to the free tier automatically — no extra steps needed.
pricing.cancel_keeps_access_nodate: Your {{plan}} access continues until the end of your current billing period. After that, your account moves to the free tier automatically.
pricing.free_tier_keeps: On the free tier you'll keep: 1 pet profile, 1 bill analysis per month, basic health timeline, and care reminders. Your existing data is never deleted.
pricing.cancel_confirmation: Cancellation takes effect at the end of your billing period — you won't be charged again.
pricing.ending_soon: Your account moves to the free tier automatically after the end date. No action needed.
pricing.need_to_step_back: Need to step back? Your data is always safe.

claims.title: Turn your vet bill into an insurance claim.
claims.subtitle: Upload your bill and insurance card. We'll draft the claim for you.
claims.no_claims_desc: Start your first insurance claim. We'll help you draft, submit, and track it.
claims.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to access insurance claim help.

scripts.title: Walk into your vet appointment prepared.
scripts.subtitle: Describe the situation and we'll generate the exact questions to ask.
scripts.situation_placeholder: e.g. My vet quoted $2,400 for knee surgery. I want to understand the alternatives and risks before agreeing.
scripts.no_scripts_desc: Generate your first question script for an upcoming vet conversation.

reminders.title: Stay ahead of every care task.
reminders.subtitle: Set email reminders for vaccines, medications, lab tests, and checkups.
reminders.no_reminders_desc: Add your first reminder — we'll email you when it's due.

timeline.title: Your pet's full health picture.
timeline.subtitle: See health markers, vet visits, and spending patterns over time.
timeline.add_markers: Upload a bill to automatically extract health markers.
timeline.requires_paid: AI health summaries are available on paid plans.
timeline.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to unlock health timeline insights.

settings.title: Your account
settings.delete_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
settings.language_desc: Choose your preferred language for the app.

contact.subtitle: Questions about a vet bill, your subscription, a feature request, or a partnership? Send a note and a real human will get back to you within one business day.
contact.response_time_desc: We reply within one business day, Monday to Friday.
contact.what_to_include_desc: Your account email (if applicable) and a clear description. Screenshots welcome.
contact.data_privacy_desc: We never share your contact details or use them for marketing without your consent.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind. Include as much context as helpful.
contact.success_desc: We'll reply to {{email}} within one business day.

subjects.bill_question: Question about my vet bill analysis

errors.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
errors.server_error_desc: We're working on fixing this. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to view this page.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this page.
errors.requires_paid_plan: This feature requires a paid plan. Upgrade to continue.
errors.limit_reached: You've reached your monthly limit for this feature.
errors.daily_limit: You've reached your daily limit. Come back tomorrow.
errors.file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum is {{max}}MB.
errors.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Please use PDF, JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
errors.invalid_magic_bytes: File content does not match the declared type.
errors.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

safety.disclaimer: PetBill Shield does not diagnose pets, does not replace your veterinarian, and never tells you to refuse care. It helps you understand costs and prepare questions. For urgent symptoms, seek immediate veterinary care.
safety.disclaimer_short: Not a diagnosis. Consult your vet for medical advice.
safety.urgent_seek_care: For urgent symptoms, seek immediate veterinary care.
